candidates.rationale: Small line-field cases have direct closed-form references and are the safest first qualification candidates.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained release evidence against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current 1D closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: analytic reference, tolerance provenance, and CI artifact must all be present before qualification

candidates.rationale: Classic beam, torsion, and frame cases are central to engineering trust and have textbook references.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained structural validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current beam-frame-classic qualification scope
required_artifacts: documented force and moment sign convention
candidates.graduation_gate: two independent canonical cases must pass with documented tolerances

candidates.rationale: 2D thermal and thermoelastic patches are needed before material heat-spreader claims can mature.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained thermal plane validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-plane-patch qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: mesh and boundary evidence must be linked from the operator reliability entry

candidates.rationale: Plane electromagnetic patches are important for dielectric and magnetic material screening.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained electromagnetic plane validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current electromagnetic-plane-patch qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: field, flux, and stored-energy checks must pass across at least two orientations

candidates.rationale: Modal workflows need convergence and mode-order evidence before serious vibration claims.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained modal frame validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current modal-frame-sanity qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: mode frequencies and ordering must remain stable under documented refinement

candidates.rationale: The Stokes operators are intentionally screening-grade; their quad and triangle fixtures now have explicit scope, boundary, tolerance, and mesh-refinement evidence for the screening boundary.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained Stokes screening boundary bundle against the convergence gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current Stokes screening-boundary qualification scope
required_artifacts: triangle geometry and heterogeneous material regression
candidates.graduation_gate: Stokes-only screening scope must be backed by retained convergence or external-reference evidence before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D acoustic bar has a compact scalar closed form and is a good first acoustic qualification boundary.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained acoustic closed-form validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current acoustic-bar closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: scalar closed-form response, frequency scaling, and damping-loss evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D advection-diffusion bar has direct flux and Peclet closed forms for constant-coefficient steady transport.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained transport closed-form validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current 1D steady transport qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: closed-form flux, Peclet scaling, and zero-velocity limit evidence must be retained before qualification
